entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (44) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $434,282

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
"CRITICAL FUNCTION". SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE, INTO THE CONTRACT, THE REQUIREMENTS FOR CHANGE REQUEST NUMBER 1827, INCOME-DRIVEN REPAYMENT PLANS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (50) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION". THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR THE DEFAULT AVERSION PILOT PROGRAM. THE NEW PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE IS FROM JANUARY 1, 2012 THROUGH DECEMBER 31, 2013.
